title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NCC Urban - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NCC Urban - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
